title: Light Spicy Rice Flour Pancake
description: A dairy-free and smoke-infused light spicy rice flour pancake suitable for a solo dinner in Croatian cuisine.

ingredients.name: Chives or Spring Onions, finely chopped

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine rice flour and water. Stir until the mixture becomes smooth without any lumps.
Add turmeric powder and garam masala (or black pepper), salt to taste. Mix well until everything is evenly distributed in the batter.
Heat sesame oil or sunflower oil in a non-stick skillet over medium heat. When hot, pour the prepared pancake mixture into the pan, tilting the pan to spread it out evenly and form a circular shape.
Cook for about 2-3 minutes on each side until golden brown. Keep warm with extra sesame oil if desired.
Sprinkle finely chopped chives or spring onions over the cooked pancakes before serving. Enjoy your light, spicy rice flour pancake as a snack.
